name: Pineapple Sundae Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Strain the crushed pineapple thoroughly.
2. Heat the pineapple with apple jelly until the jelly melts.
3. Pour the mixture into a refrigerator-safe container and stir in the light corn syrup.
4. Cover the container and store it in the refrigerator for up to one month.
